programmes.show_description: Carl Higbie gives common-sense news analysis, exposes big government and media bias, as he fights for American values.
Michael Savage delivers his insights on politics, culture, faith and more as he seeks to save Western Civilization!

programmes.show_name: Rob Carson's What in the World?
programmes.show_description: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena, and absurdity confronting us every day in America with humor and satire.
Elon Musk, the serial innovator, entrepreneur and free speech warrior is transforming life as we know it with advances in technology, outer space, politics, and government policy.

programmes.show_name: David Harris Jr. The Pulse Weekly
programmes.show_description: David Harris Jr. delivers hard-hitting analysis and opinion of the latest news and events.
Michael Savage delivers his insights on politics, culture, faith and more as he seeks to save Western Civilization!
Greg Kelly gives hardest-hitting reports and analysis from L.A. to N.Y., from Beltway to Rust Belt, talking with you and for you!
John Tabacco and his crew look at the big issues, shining a light on hypocrisy and dangerous policies of the elites.
Germany has fallen. Adolf Hitler is dead. The Allies are closing in. Senior Nazis begin to sweat. The Führer can no longer protect them.
24 Nazi officials enter the courtroom at Nuremberg, Germany. The biggest trial in history is about to begin. Broadcast around the world, the public awaits justice.
Step back in time to WWII's combat at sea. Included are scenes of everyday life on aircraft carriers, and emotional moments such as an injured seaman receiving last rites.
U.S. forces and South Vietnamese soldiers employ different strategies and a new weaponry system to fight effectively in a jungle warfare environment.
Pt. 2 brings to light different strategies soldiers used to fight in a versatile and challenging warfare environment during the Vietnam War.
